feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Backflush Components Not Appearing in Pick List Form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I've noticed that components set to backflush are not appearing in the Pick List form.
Is this the expected behavior, or could there be a configuration I'm missing?

Thanks in advance for your insights!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP system startup FMA
entry.content:
SAP Public Cloud Edition How to Enable MFA for Multiple Authentication at Login
For example, if I want to log in, I need a mobile phone verification code.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 收入認列錯誤
entry.content:
HI SAP

我看目前的收入確認碼的文檔介紹都是將在開立客戶發票的時候就會直接認列收入科目，

但我認知的收入確認應該是要在開發票的時候先認遞延收入，等到月底進行收入確認運行時再根據比例將遞延收入轉出到實際收入科目，這樣才有符合收入確認的用意。

現在的文檔內容都是將收入確認及應計收入對沖，但實際的開票認列的收入科目不會有後續轉換的動作，想再詢問各位老師有沒有什麼解決方案?

entry.title: Quality Custom field data flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Stock - Multiple materials app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Quality Heat Number Flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Multiple Stock app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Create Purchase Order - Advanced Down Payment Check
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to check down payment % before saving. But in custom logic app, i couldn't find any down payment field in Badi's.

entry.title: Information on User, Role and App ID detail
entry.content:
Dear Team,


Kindly provide details on how we can get only active user details with roles and tiles assigned to the users and the roles in one consolidated excel sheet. As we checked from the IAM Information System app we are unable to get only active users details, it is providing all the users details in excel sheet and it is also not formatted in proper manner.


Kindly guide me in a proper way on how I can get these details in a single consolidated excel sheet. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to track pallets across goods movements, deliveries, and production in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edit
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

One of our customers needs to keep track of pallets throughout the supply chain — from goods receipt and  to production and outbound deliveries — using SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

Has anyone implemented pallet tracking successfully in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
What configuration or workaround did you use?
Any tips or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Edit journal entry when processor approval Verify General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Since T-code FBV0 can no longer be used in the public cloud, we are now using the app 'Verify General Journal Entries For Requester' to submit journal entries, which are then approved and posted by the processor.

Currently, the client requests that, similar to T-code FBV0, journal entries can be manually modified during the processor review before posting. Could you suggest how to configure in the public cloud to allow the functionality where parked journal entries can be modified before posting, as was possible with FBV0 in the previous HANA version? Thank you so much.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Automating S/4HANA Cloud UI Deployment via CI/CD Pipeline
entry.content:
I'm currently developing an OnStack Extension on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. This includes a UI generated using SAP Fiori Elements. The development takes place in VSCode. For deployment to the S/4HANA Cloud, the @SAP/ux-ui5-tooling npm package is used, specifically the command fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml.

The current ui5-deploy.yaml looks as follows:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: xxx
type: application
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          url: xxx
          authenticationType: reentranceTicket
        app:
          name: xxx
          description: xxx
          package: xxx
          transport: xxx
        exclude:
          - /test/
          - /*.ts
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**

This means that the deployment is currently executed in the user context using a reentrance ticket. Now, I want to automate the deployment via a CI/CD pipeline (either Azure DevOps or SAP CI/CD Service).

The challenge is that a reentrance ticket cannot be generated in an automated context. My idea was to use a technical user, but I couldn’t find a suitable Communication Scenario that would support this kind of deployment.

What would be the best way to accomplish this?

entry.title: Automatically Closing of credit desicions in SAP
entry.content:
We have credit decesions in productiv system, which were closed automatically by workflow User but we do not know why. 

What are the rules behind? Can anyone help me with this topic?

Thanks and greetings

Franziska

entry.title: Access to your data in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition after end of contract
entry.content:
I have a customer that is currently on a 2-system landscape, and wants to re-implement on a 3-system landscape with a new contract. This means that they will close the contract of the 2-system landscape of S/4HANA Cloud Public. 

The customer has the requirement to have their data accessible for audit purposes at least for the next couple of years. What tools or what does SAP offer for these customers, how to store or get access to their data?

entry.title: Custom fields are not visible in screen maintain business partner.
entry.content:
Unable to Add Custom fields in the Maintain Business Partner App


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not displayed on output
entry.content:
Dear Expert Community,

I have an Adobe output form (DEBIT MEMO) in S4Hana public cloud where I have added a field. The field is visible/invisible on the printout as expected, but the hardcoded value of the field remains empty / doesn't display. The caption of the field is correctly displayed (or not) as prompted by the conditions, proving that the active/inactive conditions work correctly. Just the value of the field doesn't get displayed.

The active/inactive condition of this field, as well as the hardcoded value, are controlled by a piece of java code as shown below (in the below, the real Partner number is replaced by XXXXXX):

<script contentType="application/x-javascript">if(this.parent.Partner.rawValue =="XXXXXX") {this.rawValue =="TEST"}; else
{
this.presence = "inactive";
}
</script>

What could be the reason and what could be done? 

Best regards,

Katja

entry.title: purchase order formsediting or making changes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to know is there any possibility of changing the layouts to existing PO forms I got to know it can be done via adobe life cycle designer as I am new, I would like to explore more about it .is there any tutorial or links that can be referred to do some testing's by myself.

entry.title: Post Goods receipt for service order
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

To post a goods issue to an order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as a Warehouse Clerk, you'll typically follow a process that involves using the "Post Goods Movement" app.

However, this does NOT work with service orders -> Error message below.

Is there a way how this can be configured? I would like to have an app for the warehouse clerk to post a goods issue for a service order.
BR
Simon

Order 8000000080 not found or not permitted for goods movement

Message no. C6001

Diagnosis

Either the order 8000000080 does not exist or you have specified an order for which the function you want cannot be executed. For example, no goods receipt for a CO internal order or no goods issue with reference to a reservation can be carried out.

Procedure

Check your entries and select an order for which the desired function is permitted.

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a sp...
entry.content:
HI @DanailKamenov 

I understand that you have requirement that if the gross order value (excluding freight) reaches a defined threshold (e.g. 20,000 EUR), then apply a 100% discount only to the freight condition (ZFRC). 

There can be multiple solutions to solve this issue and three of then are detailed below:-

Approach 1: Using Freight Scales (No New Condition is needed)
If the freight charge is fixed or can be scaled simply, you can maintain a scale directly on ZFRC with pricing scales. 

Maintain Scales in ZFRC:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
0100
20,0000


Approach 2: Using a Separate Amount Freight Discount Condition (ZFRD)
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached. ZFRD will apply a fixed amount discount equal to the freight cost (ZFRC). Here you will need to maintain ZFRD in scales with same amount as of ZFRC like once 20,000 EUR amount is reached then discount of 100 EUR is applied.

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
00
20,000100 (same as ZFRC)


Approach 3: Using a Separate Freight percentage Discount Condition (ZFRD) with custom routine
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached(using scale). 

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example

From Value (EUR)Percentage
00
20,000100

Create Custom Routine in Alternative Calculation of Condition Amount to:

Check if the scale % is 100
Retrieve the value of ZFRC from the condition lines
Apply 100% of ZFRC as the condition value for ZFRD

For implementing the custom logic below link can be referred
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/f90a91ef60d345b0aa49e919f481d2d7.html?locale=en-US

Important scenarios to be checked during testing

  • Order value = 19,901-19,999 → ZFRD not applied 
  • Order value = 20,000 → ZFRD = -ZFRC
  • Change freight amount → ZFRD dynamically matches ZFRC

entry.title: Re: Route change in sales order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

Yes in standard, changing the route of a sales order can impact the confirmation dates, because the delivery scheduling uses route-dependent lead times to calculate them.

SAP Standard :

When you change the route on a sales order item, SAP triggers a re-scheduling of the item.

This happens because the route determines transit time and transportation lead times, which directly affect the delivery and goods issue dates. When you change the route, SAP recalculates these dates using the new route’s parameters. As a result, confirmed schedule lines may change, especially if availability check (ATP) is also active.

Further below points can be considered for checking

ATP Check: If ATP is enabled, the system will run a new availability check after the route is changed. This can lead to a change in confirmation quantity and/or date.

Scheduling Configuration: In customizing (IMG > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Delivery Scheduling and Transportation Scheduling), the system is set to re-trigger scheduling when key fields like route are updated.

User Exit / BADI: In some cases, standard logic might be enhanced or restricted using custom logic so you can check in system if you're not seeing the standard results.

entry.title: Difference Between "Batch Management" and "Batch Management (Plant)" Fields in Material Master
entry.content:
While maintaining a material in the Create Material app (MM01), I noticed two fields related to batch management:

  • Batch Management
  • Batch Management (Plant)

Could someone please explain the difference between these two fields?

When should each one be used, and how do they impact material behavior in SAP?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom fields not edited in Purchase Requisition API
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts, currently I'm developing the V4 Purchase Requisition API (Overview | Purchase Requisition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub). It works fine doing the GET and PUT methods, but I noticed that the custom fields (YY1) are not being edited, I added them on the correct context (MM_PURREQN_ITEM) and they were added automatically on the API call template. The update is working correctly on standard fields so what could be missing in order to get custom fields edited? Someone has faced something similar?

For example, if I sent "22" in lv_new_quantity, after the call it keeps its old value "7", but in case of requisiton text field (purchase_requisition_ite_2) it is correctly modified.

* Prepare business data
        ls_business_data = VALUE #(
                  purchase_requisition        = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition"
                  purchase_requisition_item   = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_item"
                  purchasing_document         = ls_requisition-purchasing_document
                  purchasing_document_item    = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_item
                  pur_reqn_release_status     = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_release_status
                  purchasing_document_subtyp  = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_subtyp
                  purchasing_document_item_c  = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_item_c"
                  purchase_requisition_ite_2  = 'TEST API'
                  account_assignment_categor  = ls_requisition-account_assignment_categor"
                  material                    = ls_requisition-material"
                  material_group              = ls_requisition-material_group"
                  requested_quantity          = ls_requisition-requested_quantity"
                  base_unit                   = ls_requisition-base_unit
                  base_unit_isocode           = ls_requisition-base_unit_isocode"
                  purchase_requisition_price  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_price"
                  pur_reqn_price_quantity     = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_price_quantity"
                  material_goods_receipt_dur  = ls_requisition-material_goods_receipt_dur
                  purchasing_organization     = ls_requisition-purchasing_organization"
                  purchasing_group            = ls_requisition-purchasing_group"
                  plant                       = ls_requisition-plant"
                  company_code                = ls_requisition-company_code
                  source_of_supply_is_assign  = ls_requisition-source_of_supply_is_assign
                  supplying_plant             = ls_requisition-supplying_plant
                  ordered_quantity            = ls_requisition-ordered_quantity
                  delivery_date               = ls_requisition-delivery_date"
                  purchase_requisition_relea  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_relea"
                  processing_status           = ls_requisition-processing_status"
                  external_approval_status    = ls_requisition-external_approval_status
                  purchasing_info_record      = ls_requisition-purchasing_info_record"
                  supplier                    = ls_requisition-supplier"
                  is_deleted                  = ls_requisition-is_deleted
                  fixed_supplier              = ls_requisition-fixed_supplier"
                  requisitioner_name          = ls_requisition-requisitioner_name
                  created_by_user             = ls_requisition-created_by_user
                  pur_req_creation_date       = ls_requisition-pur_req_creation_date
                  pur_reqn_item_currency      = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_currency
                  material_planned_delivery   = ls_requisition-material_planned_delivery
                  deliv_date_category         = ls_requisition-deliv_date_category
                  multiple_acct_assgmt_distr  = ls_requisition-multiple_acct_assgmt_distr
                  storage_location            = ls_requisition-storage_location"
                  pur_reqn_ssprequestor       = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_ssprequestor
                  pur_reqn_sspauthor          = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspauthor
                  purchase_contract           = ls_requisition-purchase_contract"
                  pur_reqn_source_of_supply   = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_source_of_supply
                  purchase_contract_item      = ls_requisition-purchase_contract_item"
                  consumption_posting         = ls_requisition-consumption_posting
                  pur_reqn_origin             = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_origin
                  pur_reqn_sspcatalog         = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcatalog
                  pur_reqn_sspcatalog_item    = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcatalog_item
                  pur_reqn_sspcross_catalog   = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcross_catalog
                  pur_reqn_item_blocking_sta  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_blocking_sta
                  pur_reqn_item_blocking_rea  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_blocking_rea
                  language                    = ls_requisition-language"
                  is_closed                   = ls_requisition-is_closed
                  release_is_not_completed    = ls_requisition-release_is_not_completed
                  service_performer           = ls_requisition-service_performer
                  product_type_code           = ls_requisition-product_type_code
                  performance_period_start_d  = ls_requisition-performance_period_start_d
                  performance_period_end_dat  = ls_requisition-performance_period_end_dat
                  purchase_order_price_type   = ls_requisition-purchase_order_price_type"
                  supplier_material_number    = ls_requisition-supplier_material_number"
                  batch                       = ls_requisition-batch
                  material_revision_level     = ls_requisition-material_revision_level
                  min_remaining_shelf_life    = ls_requisition-min_remaining_shelf_life
                  item_net_amount             = ls_requisition-item_net_amount
                  tax_code                    = ls_requisition-tax_code"
                  goods_receipt_is_expected   = ls_requisition-goods_receipt_is_expected"
                  invoice_is_expected         = ls_requisition-invoice_is_expected"
                  goods_receipt_is_non_valua  = ls_requisition-goods_receipt_is_non_valua"
                  requirement_tracking        = ls_requisition-requirement_tracking"
                  mrpcontroller               = ls_requisition-mrpcontroller
                  purchase_requisition_is_fi  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_is_fi
                  last_change_date_time       = ls_requisition-last_change_date_time
                  reservation                 = ls_requisition-reservation
                  item_delivery_address_id    = ls_requisition-item_delivery_address_id
                  pur_reqn_receiving_custome  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_receiving_custome
                  subcontractor               = ls_requisition-subcontractor
                  expected_overall_limit_amo  = ls_requisition-expected_overall_limit_amo"
                  overall_limit_amount        = ls_requisition-overall_limit_amount"
                  pur_contract_for_overall_l  = ls_requisition-pur_contract_for_overall_l
                  pur_contract_item_for_over  = ls_requisition-pur_contract_item_for_over
                  pur_reqn_external_referenc  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_external_referenc
                  pur_reqn_item_external_ref  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_external_ref"
                  pur_reqn_external_system_i  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_external_system_i
                  procurement_hub_source_sys  = ls_requisition-procurement_hub_source_sys
                  sspauthor_external_bpidn_n  = ls_requisition-sspauthor_external_bpidn_n
                  sspreqr_user_id             = ls_requisition-sspreqr_user_id
                  yy_1_stock_actual_pri       = lv_new_quantity"
                  yy_1_stock_actual_priu      = ls_requisition-yy_1_stock_actual_priu"
                  yy_1_stockde_seguridad_pri  = ls_planning-safetystockquantity"
                  yy_1_stockde_seguridad_p_2  = ls_requisition-yy_1_stockde_seguridad_p_2"
                  yy_1_puntode_reorden_pri    = ls_planning-reorderthresholdquantity"
                  yy_1_puntode_reorden_priu   = ls_requisition-yy_1_puntode_reorden_priu "
                  yy_1_motivodetraslado_pri   = ls_requisition-yy_1_motivodetraslado_pri ). "

        " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
        lo_resource = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'PURCHASE_REQN_ITEM' )->navigate_with_key( ls_entity_key ).
        lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-put ).

        " Get Etag
        lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
        DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
        DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

        " ETag is needed
        " You need to retrieve it and then set it here
        ls_business_data-etag = lv_etag.
        lo_request->set_if_match( ls_business_data-etag ).

        lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).

        " Execute the request and retrieve the business data
        lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).
